title: Skill Telemetry Event
description: Anonymous usage event for a skill invocation. Never contains actual input/output text.

outcome.description: Anonymized output metadata — never the actual content

input_length.description: Character count of input (not the text itself)

output_length.description: Character count of output (not the text itself)

duration_seconds.description: How long the skill took to run

signals_detected.description: Number of signals/patterns found (not which ones)

session_id.description: Random session ID (not tied to user identity, rotates per session)
